title: DiscordBans
body:
# DiscordBans
Punishment plugin with discord link and flexible config

## Configuration
After starting the server, ```config.yml``` will be in ```plugins/DiscordBansN```.
To start working with the plugin you must fill the fields:\
```discord-bot-id``` (not webhook)\
```discord-channel-id``` (chanell where will publish punishments)

You can edit every string in plugin config
## Type of punishments
<details>
<summary>Ban</summary>

```/ban player reason```

![ban embed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/953453a172c735b368018a1b87cadfe0b2981507.png)

Example:
```/ban yokixq grief```
</details>
<details>
<summary>Tempban</summary>

```/tempban player time reason```

Example:
```/tempban yokixq 1d grief```

![tempban embed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c380c3b04bce30dca5baf7709cd702adb9634541.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Warns</summary>

```/warn type player time(optional) reason```

In the plugin there is 3 types of warns

Red, Orange, Yellow

Red - This warn can only be removed by a moderator, no time to remove

```/warn red yokixq grief```

![red warn embed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ef8dce08b411650022377367b9e0e871141be07.png)

Yellow - This warn can be removed by the moderator and can be removed over time, when the yellow warning ends the player will be given a red warn, and the yellow warn will start again while moderator don't remove it

```/warn yellow yokixq 1d grief```

![yellow warn embed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5a0a42b225bfac22645f5d1739fe8130696c374.png)

Orange - This warning can be removed by a moderator and can be removed over time. If a player has 3 orange warnings, they will receive a red warning and the orange warnings will be removed.

```/warn orange yokixq 1d grief```

![orange warn embed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a4eb8a51151c39128b6214a45b6e844a9b90a0.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mute</summary>

```/mute player time reason```

Example:
```/mute yokixq 1d toxic```

![mute embed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/618a4044aee6bc5532450e22c131ee2601b90bd6.png)

</details>


## Commands

| Command           | Permission           | Information               | DiscordSRV Hook   | Slash Command
|---------------------|:---------------------:|:---------------------|:---------------------:|:---------------------:
| /ban         |discordbansn.ban              | Ban a player                        | ✅ | ✅
| /unban       |discordbansn.unban            | Unban a player                      | ✅ | ✅
| /tempban     |discordbansn.tempban          | Ban a player for time               | ✅ | ✅
| /discordbans |discordbansn.reload           | Reload config / Show version                      |     | ❌
| /warn        |discordbansn.warn             | Warn a player                       | ✅ | ✅
| /unwarn      |discordbansn.unwarn           | Unwarn a player                     | ✅ | ✅
| /warns       |discordbansn.warns            | See your warns (or another player)  |     | ❌
| /mute        |discordbansn.mute             | Mute a player                       | ✅ | ✅
| /unmute      |discordbansn.unmute           | Unmute a player                     | ✅ | ✅
| /banlist      |discordbansn.banlist           | Shows a list of bans                     |  | ❌

## DiscordSRV Hook
If you have DiscordSRV on your server, the plugin will ping players in message with punishment (if linking turn on)

## Find bug or need help?
Do you want to know about future updates or report a problem => [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/nyyyDStTRF)

![DiscordBansN](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/DiscordBansN.svg)
